notes: gamma is the panel's measured saturation exponent (~2.0) but is NOT applied as a global stage: at low brightness (bri 5, the expression/idle baseline) value-domain gamma crushes dim pixels to black (frostbite went from full glitter to 4-6 dots). Applied gamma=1.0; the measured 2.0 belongs in gradient-generation code, not the global correction. White-balance is the active correction.
